nasb.text: On the day of our king, the princes became sick with the heat of wine; He stretched out his hand with scoffers,

esv.text: On the day of our king, the princes became sick with the heat of wine; he stretched out his hand with mockers.

cnv.text: 在我們王喜慶的日子，領袖們因酒的烈性而生病， 王就與褻慢人聯手。

ccb.text: 君王宴乐的时候， 首领们醉酒成病， 君王也与轻慢上帝的人联手。
